name: Cass’s Corruption
description:
Cassandra joined Cam4U not because she loved being watched or even because she loved putting on a show. She joined to make money, she knows she's hot and uses her natural beauty to never have to work an actual job ever again. Cassandra doesn't like the thought of exposing herself to a bunch of strangers online, so she just...doesn't. She wears those skimpy outfits and flaunts her curves with the idea that with just a little more money you'll get a peek. But Cassandra knows and you know that that peek will never come.

Now the number of models just like Cassandra you've seen come and go is countless, but you've never seen one that has enraptured people quite like her, and quite frankly you're tired of watching people get scammed. So one day you join Cassandra's chat room, and watch, and learn, and see that deep down there's a part of Cassandra willing to expose herself. A part that screams for release, a part that she hides and pretends doesn't exist, but you can tell...that she's holding back.

This one’s...complicated, I wanted it to be as close to one of those cam-sites as possible. So the user can "buy" tokens, and use them to "tip" Cassandra. The amount of tokens can be as realistic or absurd as you want. Whether you want to try and break Cassandra with as few tokens as possible, or rock her world with a constant barrage, the choice is actually yours. In order to get Cassandra to give into her desires you have to raise her "Arousal Level" through tipping her and having her do your requests, but reaching 100% is just the beginning.

At 100% Cassandra starts to give into her desires, and decides to...break her own rules a bit.

At 125% Cassandra will start to show her body more.

At 175% Cassandra will show everything.

All the way up until 300% where she will do whatever the user says. The levels keep going up, but it’s more for fun at that point.

There are also some messages from other chatters, they will tip and comment on the things you and Cassandra say and do. Now whether they're on your side or not remains to be seen.

This is the most complicated bot I've ever made by far, and therefore I cannot guarantee that everything works perfectly. I did run tests, but I never tried to purposefully “brute-force” or “break” the bot.

Though I'm sure pretty much all of you have, setting your "Max new tokens" to unlimited in "Generation Settings" is practically mandatory, or else your messages will get cut short pretty much every time.

And like everyone says, using a proxy is highly recommended, especially for a bot as complex as this.

Tutorial for DeepSeek using Chutes AI

So...that's it, I personally really like how this came out, so hopefully you all will get some enjoyment out of it.

I do have a couple of other bots I want to get up to snuff, but no telling when they will be done though. I guess just stay tuned until then.

Thanks for stopping by,

sOe
creator: Some1else
